## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Katya to the Udemy account and provide context on the engagement, challenges, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy engagement has been slow-moving (week 6 of 8) due to stakeholder alignment issues; now finally getting needed insights](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Shifting from AI-focused publication to broader skills-based content strategy aligned with Udemy's existing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Need to balance content cadence with improving repeatability/efficiency of content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [SEO considerations and leveraging Udemy's existing content/data will be key focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Udemy Engagement

  - [Initially pitched as AI-focused publication with newsletter; now evolving to skills-based content aligned with existing Udemy efforts](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Working with Steph (Senior Director of Digital/Demand) and Justin (SEO Manager) to integrate with business.udemy blog](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Slow progress due to stakeholder alignment issues - only now getting critical context in week 6 of 8](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Delivered first calibration piece last week, awaiting detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Shifting from narrow AI focus to broader skills-based approach aligned with Udemy's existing content](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

  - [Need to navigate internal dynamics while pushing engagement forward](https://fathom.video/share/bpXcPZz8N5zbU6Lcbwuj7GBXtEKwNBch?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
